as_of.title: Opening remarks for moderated conversation at The University of Texas at El Paso

inflation.label: broadening / underlying
inflation.note: She stresses excess inflation is not just tariffs and energy, points to underlying measures running in the mid-2s and watches expectations.
inflation.quote: A good deal of the excess inflation over the past year has come from temporary factors, such as tariffs and energy price increases. But not all.

labor.label: stable / balanced
labor.note: Unemployment around 4.3 percent with job gains in line with slow labor-force growth.
labor.quote: The labor market appears stable and broadly balanced.

stance.label: loose/accommodative
stance.note: She judges policy is not restraining a strong economy with accommodative financial conditions and floats the need for higher rates.
stance.quote: These conditions indicate that monetary policy is not restraining the economy.
